subject: fix(ui): replace invisible low-opacity tinted backgrounds with base surfaces
body:
Low-opacity tinted backgrounds (bg-primary/10, bg-secondary/15, bg-error/10,
bg-success/10, bg-warning/10) become invisible on dark DaisyUI themes where
the base background is near-black. ~45 instances across 16 components.

Replaced with bg-base-200/bg-base-300 — DaisyUI semantic surface colors that
guarantee contrast on all themes. Colored text (text-primary, text-error, etc.)
carries semantic meaning instead of background tint.

Fixed: LayoutTab, ExportButtons, ContentTab, FreeformEditor, DesktopLayout,
MobileLayout, PlatformPreview, TemplatesTab, MiniCellGrid, MediaTab,
SaveLoadModal, BurgerMenu, EmptyStateGuide, ErrorBoundary, InstallInstructionsModal.

Tags: ui, contrast, accessibility, dark-theme, daisyui
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
